This shows a triangular region of empty cells in the lower-left corner! And there's a diagonal band of X's running from lower-left to upper-right (excluding the completely filled rows). This looks like a match!


Third grid has a vertical band of filled cells along the left edge with empty cells forming a rectangle in the middle rows, not the diagonal pattern needed. Below this band lies a triangular region of empty cells in the lower-left: three empty cells in row 4, two in row 3, and one in row 2.
